allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add TipoContratto schemas and CRUD API endpoints

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add Contratto schemas and CRUD API endpoints

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
Bash(git add backend/verify_scadenze.py && git commit -m "chore: remove debug script verify_scadenze.py")

Bash(git add backend/app/api/dashboard.py frontend/src/services/dashboardService.ts && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: dashboard query safety \(and_ explicit, filter attivo\) + remove dead code

- contratti_scaduti: add stato=="attivo" filter to exclude already closed contracts
- contratti_critici: replace & operators with explicit and_\(\) inside or_\(\)
- remove dead getUpcomingDeadlines\(\) from dashboardService.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add backend/app/ai/vector_store.py backend/app/ai/__init__.py backend/app/ai/embeddings.py backend/app/api/search.py backend/app/api/documenti.py backend/scripts/index_all_documents.py backend/list_models.py && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
refactor: unify vector store, remove legacy embeddings.py

- vector_store: collection.add -> upsert \(safe re-indexing\)
- vector_store: add delete_document\(\) async method
- search.py: migrate from embeddings to vector_store \(async endpoint\)
- documenti.py: migrate delete ChromaDB call to vector_store.delete_document\(\)
- index_all_documents.py: async rewrite using vector_store.add_document\(\)
- __init__.py: replace embeddings exports with VectorStore/vector_store
- delete embeddings.py and list_models.py \(legacy Gemini scripts\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git rm backend/scripts/index_all_documents.py && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: ensure delete_documento is async + remove duplicate reindex script

- delete_documento was already async def \(confirmed\)
- remove index_all_documents.py \(duplicate of reindex_all.py\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add frontend/src/components/Omnibox.tsx frontend/src/layouts/AppLayout.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: add Omnibox global semantic search bar in AppLayout header

- New Omnibox.tsx component: debounced semantic search \(400ms\),
  dropdown with tipo_documento color-coded badges, client name resolution,
  keyboard navigation \(arrows/enter/escape\), "/" shortcut to focus,
  loading spinner, empty state, click-outside close
- AppLayout.tsx: import Omnibox, place in header between title and right edge

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add frontend/src/components/Omnibox.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: omnibox focus state, debounce cleanup, abort race condition

- isFocused state replaces non-reactive document.activeElement check
- cleanup useEffect aborts pending fetch and clears debounce timer on unmount
- AbortController per-request; CanceledError/AbortError silently ignored

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add backend/app/ai/vector_store.py backend/app/api/documenti.py && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: sync VectorStore metadata on PATCH classifica + update

- vector_store: new update_metadata\(\) method \(collection.update, no re-embedding\)
- update_documento: async, calls update_metadata after db.commit
- classifica_documento: async, calls update_metadata after db.commit
- VectorStore errors never block the PATCH response \(try/except + log\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add backend/app/ai/vector_store.py && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: use is not None for file_name and macro_categoria in VectorStore

Truthy checks dropped empty strings from metadata dicts, causing
incomplete upsert/update when values were "". Consistent with the
existing is not None pattern used for cliente_id and anno_competenza.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
